ns0:entry.ns0:title: EFForg/rayhunter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EFForg/rayhunter
Language: rust
Rust tool to detect cell site simulators on an orbic mobile hotspot

ns0:entry.ns0:title: antinomyhq/forge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/antinomyhq/forge
Language: rust
AI enabled pair programmer for Claude, GPT, O Series, Grok, Deepseek, Gemini and 300+ models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bevyengine/bevy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bevyengine/bevy
Language: rust
A refreshingly simple data-driven game engine built in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cjpais/Handy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cjpais/Handy
Language: rust
A free, open source, and extensible speech-to-text application that works completely offline.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gfx-rs/wgpu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gfx-rs/wgpu
Language: rust
A cross-platform, safe, pure-Rust graphics API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
Language: rust
The GitButler version control client, backed by Git, powered by Tauri/Rust/Svelte

ns0:entry.ns0:title: marlocarlo/psmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/marlocarlo/psmux
Language: rust
Tmux on Windows Powershell - tmux for PowerShell, Windows Terminal, cmd.exe. Includes psmux, pmux, and tmux commands. This is native Powershell Tmux designed for Windows in Rust 🦀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: max-sixty/worktrunk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/max-sixty/worktrunk
Language: rust
Worktrunk is a CLI for Git worktree management, designed for parallel AI agent workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nautechsystems/nautilus_trader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nautechsystems/nautilus_trader
Language: rust
A high-performance algorithmic trading platform and event-driven backtester

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pola-rs/polars
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pola-rs/polars
Language: rust
Extremely fast Query Engine for DataFrames, written in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: servo/servo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/servo/servo
Language: rust
Servo aims to empower developers with a lightweight, high-performance alternative for embedding web technologies in applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: surrealdb/surrealdb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb
Language: rust
A scalable, distributed, collaborative, document-graph database, for the realtime web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tokio-rs/tokio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tokio-rs/tokio
Language: rust
A runtime for writing reliable asynchronous applications with Rust. Provides I/O, networking, scheduling, timers, ...

ns0:entry.ns0:title: web-infra-dev/rspack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rspack
Language: rust
The fast Rust-based JavaScript bundler with a modernized webpack API 🦀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yfedoseev/pdf_oxide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yfedoseev/pdf_oxide
Language: rust
The fastest PDF library for Python and Rust. Text extraction, image extraction, markdown conversion, PDF creation & editing. 0.8ms mean, 5× faster than industry leaders, 100% pass rate on 3,830 PDFs. MIT/Apache-2.0.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zed-industries/zed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zed-industries/zed
Language: rust
Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.
